title: Achieve 90% hand hygiene compliance system-wide by Q2 2026
description: System-wide quality objective to raise hand hygiene compliance from current average of 74% to 90% across all facilities. Measured via monthly direct observation audits.

title: 100% medication reconciliation within 24 hours of admission
description: Achieve 100% compliance with 24-hour medication reconciliation requirement at all applicable facilities. Currently at 72% system-wide, with Dillon at 72% as lowest performer.

title: Zero credentialing documentation deficiencies at next DNV survey
description: Eliminate all credentialing file deficiencies before the next DNV accreditation survey. Current baseline: 3 deficient files identified in FND-001.

title: Establish documented governing body quality review for every quarter
description: Ensure that governing body meeting minutes document formal review of quality and patient safety data for every quarter. Q2 2025 was missed per FND-007; must achieve 4/4 quarters going forward.

title: 100% policy currency — all policies reviewed within 12-month cycle
description: Achieve 100% policy review currency across the system. Current state: 88% of policies reviewed within their scheduled 12-month cycle. FND-008 flagged infection prevention policy as overdue for CDC guidance update.
